3133410.name: SPELLBLUD
3133410.description:
RUN. KILL. LOOT. REPEAT.

SPELLBLUD is a retro dark fantasy horde-slayer where you run around blasting monsters and trying not to die.
Open chests, grab weapons, collect spells, and stack upgrade tomes until you become an unstoppable magic meat grinder.

SLAY TO SURVIVE

  • Fight endless waves of enemies — the longer you live, the harder it gets.

  • Keep moving, keep blasting, keep looting. Standing still = death.

LOOT AND POWER UP

  • Open chests to find new weapons, devastating spells, and mysterious upgrade tomes.

  • Each pickup makes you stronger — or weirder.

  • Build your own chaotic loadout and see how long you can last before the horde wins.

PURE CHAOS. PURE FUN.

  • Fast, dumb, and addictive gameplay.

  • Explosions, spells, and lots (and lots) of blud.

  • No story. No talking. Just survival.
3133410.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
